series_metadata.series_description: This series consists of all documentation related to loans and bonds through the State Infrastructure Bank (i.e. application, committee approval, signed term sheet, payment schedule, loan agreement, promissory note, guarantor agreement, draw requests, amendments, Attorney General requested documents, or bond trustee documents).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Life of Loan / Bond Term + . Scan and paper. ; Electronic: Maintain permanently
